caption: The video appears to be set at an event or conference related to Big Data, specifically the "BigDataSV 2015" event. The frames show a backdrop with logos and text, including the hashtag "#BigDataSV" and the year "2015," indicating that this is likely a promotional or informational segment for the event. The backdrop also features the logo of "The CUBE," which might be a sponsor or partner of the event. A bright light source is visible on the left side of the frame, possibly part of the event's lighting setup. The overall setting suggests a professional environment focused on technology and data analytics.
